recommendations.title: Titus
recommendations.overview: Titus Andronicus returns from the wars and sees his sons and daughters taken from him, one by one. Shakespeare's goriest and earliest tragedy.

recommendations.title: Across the Universe
recommendations.overview: When young dockworker Jude leaves Liverpool to find his estranged father in the United States, he is swept up by the waves of change that are re-shaping the nation. Jude falls in love with Lucy, who joins the growing anti-war movement. As the body co

recommendations.title: The Tempest
recommendations.overview: An adaptation of the play by William Shakespeare. Prospera (a female version of Shakespeare's Prospero) is the usurped ruler of Milan who has been banished to a mysterious island with her daughter. Using her magical powers, she draws her enemies to t

recommendations.title: P.S. I Love You
recommendations.overview: A young widow discovers that her late husband has left her 10 messages intended to help ease her pain and start a new life.

recommendations.title: Vicky Cristina Barcelona
recommendations.overview: Two girlfriends on a summer holiday in Spain become enamored with the same painter, unaware that his ex-wife, with whom he has a tempestuous relationship, is about to re-enter the picture.

recommendations.title: Maudie
recommendations.overview: Canadian folk artist Maud Lewis falls in love with a fishmonger while working for him as a live-in housekeeper.

recommendations.title: Jezebel
recommendations.overview: In 1850s Louisiana, the willfulness of a tempestuous Southern belle threatens to destroy all who care for her.

recommendations.title: Devdas
recommendations.overview: In 1900s India, Calcuttan zamindar Devdas Mukherjee — unable to marry his lover — takes up alcohol and the company of a courtesan to alleviate the pain.

recommendations.title: Life Itself
recommendations.overview: As a young New York couple goes from college romance to marriage and the birth of their first child, the unexpected twists of their journey create reverberations that echo over continents and through lifetimes.

recommendations.title: Shame
recommendations.overview: In the midst of a civil war, a pair of former violinists in a tempestuous marriage oversee a farm on a rural island. In spite of their best efforts to escape their homeland, the war impinges on every aspect of their lives.
